title: unifolium trifolium
intro: Unifolium trifolium, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial herb native to South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Unifolium trifolium include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant medicinally.
